## Checklist

- [ ] Plain markdown only — no secrets, no real client data
- [ ] `demo/` data stays fictional
- [ ] New skills live in `.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`; new rituals in `.claude/commands/`; each has clear frontmatter
- [ ] I ran the affected ritual (e.g. `/demo-briefing`) and it still works
